rows.notes: Consensus across extractors for this clear header.

rows.description: Schola Faria.
rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection clearly shows 'Schola Faria' rather than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Victoria Parish', despite ornate handwriting. `gpt-5-mini` misread the initial S and F.

rows.description: Cooler allowed for repairs
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description as visual inspection confirms 'Cooler', not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Pester'. The initial 'C' is distinct.

rows.description: Allowed for Cow Head &c. at Weston
rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash` for both amount and description. Visual inspection confirms the amount is £5, not `gpt-5-mini`'s £6, and the description matches 'Cow Head &c. at Weston', which is clearly legible.

rows.description: Subscription to Chapel at Limerick
rows.notes: Consensus across extractors for this row.

rows.description: Bill for the Frameloor at St. Gilbert, Littleham
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms 'Frameloor at St. Gilbert, Littleham'. The description is clearer than `gpt-5-mini`'s attempt with question marks implies, though 'Frameloor' itself is an unusual word.

rows.description: Bill for Timber for Stone at the Farm
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms 'Bill for Timber for Stone at the Farm', which is clearly legible. `gpt-5-mini`'s note about 'Bile' is not supported by visual evidence.

rows.description: Gibbs - Tablets at the Altar - to Mr. Williams
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms 'Gibbs - Tablets at the Altar - to Mr. Williams', which is clearly legible. `gpt-5-mini`'s reading of 'A. W? Hutchinson' is incorrect.

rows.description: Woollmer - Advertisement in the Exeter paper
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms 'Woollmer' (double 'l' is visible) and 'Exeter paper'. 'Advertisement' appears singular. `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Ekes' is incorrect.

rows.description: Bill, Carpenter, for repairs at Campfield
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms 'Bill' (not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Ellis') and 'Campfield' (not 'Camper field').

rows.description: Mss. Brightfoot - Subscription to School at Exeter
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms 'Mss. Brightfoot' and 'Exeter', not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Mr Spitford' or 'Woolston'.

rows.description: Bill at King's Arms for journey to St. Dew
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms 'Bill' (singular, not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Bills') and 'St. Dew' as the place name, though it is somewhat faded.

rows.description: Mr. J. Thomas for Garden Services
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms the initial 'J' for Mr. Thomas (not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'W') and 'Services' (plural).

rows.description: Subscription to the Poor Children's
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms 'Poor Children's', which is clearly legible, not `gpt-5-mini`'s fragmentary '... Culverts'.

rows.description: Portrait of Sir W. Morris
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms 'Morris' (with 's' not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'ce').

rows.description: Costs Culwick into the Rector's Court
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms 'Costs Culwick' (not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Cash taken') and 'Court' (not 'Count').

rows.description: Mr. G. H. Cornish for the erection of
rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s two-row braced entry structure, which matches the image. Description also aligns with visual inspection, including the initial 'G' for Cornish (not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'E'). No amount expected on this first line of the brace.

rows.description: a new Crossbed at Plumpston
rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description and amount for the second line of the braced entry. Visual inspection confirms 'Crossbed' (not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Curbstone') and 'Plumpston' (not 'Plimpton').

rows.description: Bill for repairs at Yarnton
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Adopted `gpt-5-mini`'s description for 'Yarnton' over `gemini-flash`'s 'Yarmton' based on visual inspection of the 'n' character.

rows.description: Doggets Wine Bottle 9d ½ to Lady 1838
rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash` for amount and description. Visual inspection confirms 'Doggets Wine Bottle' (not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Dormer') and the presence of '½' after the pence value of '6', indicating 6.5 pence. `gpt-5-mini` misread the fraction and the first word.

rows.description: Mr. Collins' Prize books
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and primary description. Added standard punctuation for possessive and Mr. based on common ledger formatting.

rows.description: Mr. Taunton £100 in full of
rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s two-row braced entry structure, which matches the image. Description also aligns with visual inspection, specifically 'Mr. Taunton £100 in full of' (not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Mr W. Thornton'). No amount expected on this first line of the brace.

rows.description: All demands for the College & Library
rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description and amount for the second line of the braced entry. Visual inspection confirms text and amounts.

rows.description: Retained by Mr. Davison on the College
rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s two-row braced entry structure, which matches the image. Description also aligns with visual inspection, specifically 'Mr. Davison' (not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Mr. S. Ashton'). No amount expected on this first line of the brace.

rows.description: Account - April 1828 but then omitted
rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description and amount for the second line of the braced entry. Visual inspection confirms text and amounts.

rows.description: Bill for drain round the Chancel at Newton
rows.notes: Amounts agree. Selected `gemini-flash` for description. Visual inspection confirms 'Bill for drain round the Chancel at Newton'. `gpt-5-mini` misread 'Bill' as 'Pills' and 'Newton' as 'Nannington', and added an '&'.

rows.description: Mr. Dagnam - Bills for Bridge, Pumps &c.
rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s two-row braced entry structure, which matches the image. Description also aligns with visual inspection, specifically 'Mr. Dagnam' (not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Mr Dayman'). No amount expected on this first line of the brace.

rows.description: Cottage gardens at Little Lew
rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description and amount for the second line of the braced entry. Visual inspection confirms 'Cottage gardens at Little Lew' (not `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Pillage gardens at Little ???') and the amount of 17s 11d 6 (not `gpt-5-mini`'s 17s 1d 6).
Amounts agree. Adopted `gemini-flash`'s empty description, as the 'L' is part of the brace, and there's no textual description for the total line itself. Visual inspection confirms amounts clearly.
